reference_source_entries.title: PEER Structural Performance Database (SPD)
reference_source_entries.fit_role: component-level RC hysteresis reference for wall/core and nonlinear calibration surfaces
gap_targets: P0 PBD hinge property refresh
member-local hysteresis / damage state benchmark diversification
integration_fit: column family holdout split for PBD review package
data_shape: 400+ cyclic lateral-load tests of reinforced concrete columns
geometry, reinforcement, axial load, damage observations
reference_source_entries.recommended_ingestion_mode: start with a small curated slice of spiral and rectangular columns and convert them into hinge-refresh calibration fixtures
reference_source_entries.notes: Most useful external authority source for moving hinge refresh from projected optimization changes toward experimentally anchored response families.

reference_source_entries.title: E-Defense / PEER blind prediction benchmark
reference_source_entries.fit_role: blind-prediction nonlinear authority reference for RC and critical-facility diligence surfaces
gap_targets: authority-grade nonlinear / collapse benchmark diversity
member-local hysteresis and frame-response validation beyond projected hinge refresh
blind prediction style compare/report/viewer workflow
reference_source_entries.recommended_ingestion_mode: start with one PEER/E-Defense benchmark family that can be normalized into source_manifest -> benchmark_case -> compare_report -> viewer_entry, before attempting broader collapse suites
reference_source_entries.notes: Very high value, but should follow Canton Tower because the repo is already strongest on measured/review chains and only partially closed on full collapse mechanics.

reference_source_entries.title: PEER Report 2003-10 beam-column joint model
reference_source_entries.fit_role: joint/core shear and anchorage reference for transfer podium storytelling
gap_targets: P0 panel-zone 3D clash / anchorage
joint shear and anchorage benchmark coverage
integration_fit: anchorage field naming and minimum row requirements
future solver-verified panel source acceptance tests
data_shape: joint core shear and interface shear-transfer mechanisms
reference_source_entries.recommended_ingestion_mode: use as the first benchmark-backed schema reference for panel-zone joint rows and anchorage failure annotations
reference_source_entries.notes: This is not a drop-in raw dataset like TPU or SPD, but it is the strongest official reference for the exact mechanisms the current panel holdout is missing.

reference_source_entries.title: Canton Tower megastructure SHM benchmark
reference_source_entries.fit_role: measured megatall benchmark for outrigger and belt-truss commercialization narratives
gap_targets: measured megatall dynamic benchmark beyond Atwood recurrence
reduced-order SHM benchmark ingestion for irregular/megatall review chain
viewer/results explorer provenance on official measured high-rise response
reference_source_entries.recommended_ingestion_mode: ingest as an official reduced-order SHM benchmark, not as a full-order native FE benchmark
reference_source_entries.notes: Best next-frontier benchmark for the current repo because it exercises measured megatall response, provenance, and viewer/review chains without requiring full-order FE ingestion on day one.

reference_source_entries.title: TPU Aerodynamic Database
reference_source_entries.fit_role: public high-rise wind authority reference for premium tower commercialization surfaces
gap_targets: P1 raw wind-tunnel HFFB mapping verification
high-rise wind pressure / force benchmark diversification
integration_fit: wind node / floor pressure binding validation
data_shape: multiple high-rise geometries including interference cases
reference_source_entries.recommended_ingestion_mode: add at least one isolated high-rise case and one interference case as external raw wind benchmark fixtures with source manifest
reference_source_entries.notes: Best direct match for current wind holdout because it supplies official wind-tunnel pressure and force datasets instead of only semantic pressure binding.

reference_source_entries.title: DesignSafe liquefaction-induced downdrag on pile foundations dataset
reference_source_entries.fit_role: foundation and pile-soil interaction reference for below-grade or basement family commercialization
reference_source_entries.publisher: DesignSafe liquefaction-induced downdrag on pile foundations dataset
gap_targets: P1 foundation / mat / pile optimization
soil-structure interaction and pile demand diversity
integration_fit: foundation scope promotion beyond below-grade geometric heuristics
SSI regression family for foundation optimization artifact
data_shape: centrifuge experiments on liquefaction-induced downdrag in pile foundations
reference_source_entries.recommended_ingestion_mode: pair one measured DesignSafe centrifuge case with one synthetic SimCenter Pile Group family so measured and parametric foundation tracks are both covered
reference_source_entries.notes: Best candidate for diversifying foundation benchmarking because it adds real pile-soil interaction evidence rather than more superstructure-only cases.
